predictions.reasoning: Regulation § 6 explicitly requires enterprises to implement preventive measures anchored with direct suppliers, including consideration of human-rights and environmental expectations in supplier selection, contractual assurances, and monitoring—directly matching the scope of supplier due diligence.

Regulation § 6 mandates implementation of trainings and further education (Schulungen und Weiterbildungen) for suppliers to enforce contractual commitments, requiring a training management capability to plan and deliver these programs.
